servinfo.title: Front Wheel Alignment Description
servinfo.ptxt: Among factors for front wheel alignment, only toe setting can be adjusted. Camber and caster cannot be adjusted.

Therefore, should camber or caster be out of specification due to the damage caused by hazardous road conditions or collision, whether the damage is in body or in suspension should be determined and damaged body should be repaired or damaged suspension should be replaced.

attention3.ptxt: To prevent possible incorrect reading of toe, camber or caster, vehicle front and rear end must be moved up and down a few times before inspection.
